_comment: Haptic-engine output calibration (software/haptic/engine.py). intensity_amp maps the 3 ordinal intensity levels (channel_map.json `intensity_levels`) to playback amplitude; channel_gain is the per-channel software volume that equalizes felt strength across the 12 body sites (docs/18 Exp 4 -- this is THE volume control, not the bypassed amp pots). clip_ceiling caps every channel so the filterless Class-D output never clips into near-DC (cooks the coil, feels worse -- docs/18 safety). Values below are BENCH starting points; overwrite channel_gain on-body Saturday.
